launch_scope.authorized_action: Rerun the existing B04.R5 same-head router-versus-best-adapter proof a fourth time on the git HEAD that includes this launch surface.
launch_scope.required_same_head_rule: The rerun must regenerate ordered proof artifacts and the ratification receipt on the same post-launch git HEAD, and all rerun artifacts must declare subject_head equal to that HEAD.
launch_scope.readiness_use_rule: The post-third-rerun reconsideration adjudication receipt may justify opening this separate counted launch surface only. It does not count as proof, does not earn superiority, and does not substitute for the counted same-head receipt family on the post-launch head.

not_authorized: any paraphrase from reconsideration adjudication into earned router superiority
pass_criteria: A separate counted launch surface is bound for a fourth same-head rerun of B04.R5 only.
The launch surface does not claim rerun success and does not authorize R6 or any wider scope.
The reconsideration adjudication receipt is treated as noncanonical reopening justification only, not counted proof.
fail_conditions: The launch surface is treated as a rerun result instead of a rerun authorization.
R6, lobes, externality, comparative claims, or commercial activation are widened from this launch surface.
The reconsideration adjudication receipt is allowed to stand in for same-head counted proof.
claim_boundary: This launch contract authorizes only a future fourth same-head counted rerun of B04.R5 under the existing proof law. It does not itself rerun the proof, does not earn router superiority, and does not open R6, lobes, externality, comparative claims, or commercial scope.
